name: CONSUMERS ENERGY CO
business: Consumers provides electricity and natural gas to residential, commercial, and industrial customers in Michigan's Lower Peninsula. NorthStar Clean Energy develops and operates renewable generation and markets independent power production.

exposures.sentence: Consumers electric utility operations include the generation, purchase, distribution, and sale of electricity, and Consumers gas utility operations include the purchase, transmission, storage, distribution, and sale of natural gas.
Consumers updates to its Renewable Energy Plan include up to 9,000 MW of both purchased and owned solar energy resources and up to 4,000 MW of wind energy resources.
The 2023 Energy Law... created a new energy storage standard, requiring electric utilities to file plans by 2029 to help achieve a statewide target of 2,500 MW.
Consumers also faces competition or potential competition associated with data center expansion
Advancements in technology related to items such as battery storage, carbon capture/storage, and electric vehicles may not become commercially available or economically feasible as projected.

catalysts.event: Commercial operation of renewable natural gas facilities
catalysts.sentence: Consumers has renewable natural gas facilities under construction scheduled for commercial operation in 2026.

catalysts.event: Planned updates to integrated resource plan
catalysts.sentence: Consumers updates to its Renewable Energy Plan, which were approved by the MPSC in September 2025, and planned updates to its integrated resource plan in 2026 will serve as a blueprint to meeting the requirements of the 2023 Energy Law.
